titleStmt.title: SII 18.271: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 271. (B.K. No. 129 of 1933-34.) BIJĀPUR, BIJAPUR TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Third face of a pillar in Ark-killah.

summary.p: This inscription, referring itself to the reign of Rāmachandradēva is dated in Śaka 1225, Krōdhi, Chaitra śu. 11, Wednesday. It may be noted that the tithi (towards the end of the record) is called Harivāsada-ēkādaśi. In the cyclic year Krōdhi which was Śaka 1226 (expired), the details correspond to A.D. 1304, March 18, Wednesday.
It states that the Ūroḍeyas and Mahājanas of Vijeyāpura made a grant of land to Maddaleya Kallayya and his brother for playing on musical instruments at the time of worshipping the god Nārasiṁha.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgasirastuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanaga
rāraṁbhaṁ mūlastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē . kanaka
mayakirīṭaprāṁtasaṁbaṁdhapaṭṭaḥ padakamaṇima
yūkhabhrājyatōtkaṁṭrarēkhāvijayanaraharīśaḥ®pā
tu yuṣmatsurēśaḥ karanikaravilōḷatkaṁkaṇānīka
māḷā . vijaya purāśvasabhaughōyaṁ vēdanā
damanōharaḥ . taṁ pāyādghōrasaṁsāravēdanādama
nōharaḥ . svasti śrīmatu yādavanārāyaṇaṁ bhujabaḷaThese verses contain many scribal errors.
prauḍhapratāpacakravartti śrīrāmacaṁdradēvarāya vije
yajyāścayābhyudayāśca śakavarṣa 1225 neya krōRead vijayaścābhyudayaśca.
dhisaṁvatsarada caitra śu 11 budhavāradaṁdu śrī
madrāyarājadhāni dakṣiṇavāraṇāsi vijeyāpura
dalu śrīmaṁnārasiṁhvadēvargge 12 rvva vūroḍeyara 162
rvvaru Aśēśamahājanaṁgaḷu yānārasiṁhadēvara trikālada bhō
gavu diṁḍigevu vādyavanu bārisuvaṁtāgi maddaḷiya kallaya taṁna taṁ
manugūḍi yibbaru naḍavaṁtāgi koṭa ḍhakkeya kēriyiṁdaṁ paḍu
valu kaṁttiya sthaḷadiṁ kāludāriyiṁda baḍagalu te
vara mēlaṇa haṇitegeṟeyiṁdaṁ muḍalu sāhaṇige
ṟeya sthaḷadiṁdaṁ teṁkalidda cadurāghāṭada madhyada I
durvvāra sahitavaha 10 mattaru keyyanu mattaṁ hi
riya nārasiṁhvapuradoḷage Ā maddaḷeya kallayyana maneyiṁ
daṁ paḍuvalu bīḷu nivēśaṇavoṁdu maneya byavasāyadavargge
Iṁtiṣṭuvanū sarvvanamasyavāgi harivāsada yēkādasiya
lu dhārapūrvvakavāgi koṭṭaru Ā vuraḍeya mahājanaṁga
ḷige maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 18.271 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
